title: gladiolus inflatus
intro: Gladiolus inflatus is a type of plant species that belongs to the Iridaceae family, commonly known as a type of gladiolus or sword lily. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus inflatus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
